Who We Are

The Art of Capital Introduction

Otium Capital is a premier institutional placement agent serving the alternative investment community. We bridge the gap between exceptional fund managers and the allocators seeking them — with discretion, precision, and an uncompromising standard of excellence.

Founded on the belief that genuine relationships produce lasting results, our team brings deep cross-market experience to every engagement — spanning private equity, private credit, hedge funds, and real assets.

Relationships First

Every introduction is earned through trust built over time, not transactions.

Deep Expertise

We speak the language of allocators — and of the managers who seek them.

Tailored Strategy

No two mandates are alike. Every campaign is built from first principles.

Long-Term Partners

We succeed only when our clients succeed. Alignment is non-negotiable.

What We Do

Comprehensive
Placement Services

We offer an integrated suite of capital raising solutions, purpose-built for alternative fund managers who demand institutional-grade representation.

01
Capital Introduction & Placement

Strategic introductions to pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, family offices, endowments, foundations, and fund-of-funds on a global basis. Our network spans over 200 active institutional relationships.

→
02
Fund Marketing & Positioning

From materials audit to investor roadshow orchestration, we refine how your fund is positioned in the market — ensuring the right message reaches the right allocators at the right moment.

→
03
Investor Relations Advisory

Ongoing strategic counsel on LP communication, transparency frameworks, and retention strategy. We help you build the kind of investor base that endures through cycles.

→
04
Due Diligence Preparation

Institutional investors have rigorous standards. We prepare your organization for operational, legal, and investment due diligence — helping you close efficiently when conviction is established.

→
05
Manager Launch Support

Emerging managers benefit from our extensive experience guiding first-time fund formations — from seed investor strategy to Day One institutional readiness and ongoing LP engagement.

→
06
Strategic Growth Advisory

Beyond capital raising, we advise on business development, distribution strategy, team structuring, and the organizational evolution required to scale from boutique to institutional franchise.

→
How We Work

A Disciplined
Process

We reject the spray-and-pray model. Every engagement begins with deep diligence and ends with lasting partnerships.

01

Manager Diligence

We conduct thorough investment, operational, and organizational diligence before accepting any mandate — ensuring we represent only managers we'd allocate to ourselves.

02

Positioning & Narrative

We craft a compelling, differentiated story that resonates with institutional allocators — translating complex strategies into clear, investor-ready language.

03

Targeted Outreach

Precision-targeted introductions to the most relevant allocators from our proprietary network, based on mandate fit, capacity, and investment timing.

04

Pipeline Management

Active oversight of the investor pipeline — coordinating follow-up, materials, meetings, and due diligence to keep momentum through every stage of the process.

05

Close & Onboard

From subscription documents to onboarding communications, we facilitate a seamless close and establish the foundation for a long-term LP relationship.

"The best capital introductions are the result of preparation, patience, and genuine alignment between manager and allocator."

— Otium Capital Investment Philosophy

Investor Universe

Who We
Reach

Our network encompasses the full spectrum of institutional capital — from the world's largest sovereign funds to sophisticated family offices seeking differentiated alternatives exposure.

🏛

Pension Funds

Public and private pension systems with mandates for alternative investments and absolute return strategies.

🌐

Sovereign Wealth Funds

National reserve funds and government investment vehicles across the Middle East, Asia, and Europe.

🎓

Endowments & Foundations

University endowments and charitable foundations following the alternatives-heavy Yale/Harvard model.

👨‍👩‍👦

Family Offices

Single and multi-family offices with sophisticated alternatives programs and direct investing mandates.

🏦

Insurance Companies

Life and property & casualty insurers seeking yield-enhancing and liability-matched alternative strategies.

📊

Fund of Funds

Dedicated hedge fund and private equity fund-of-funds platforms constructing diversified alternatives portfolios.
